summary: Iteration 26 - LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) Feature Validation. All backend and frontend tests passed. LLDP data is correctly stored via connector API, retrieved via GET endpoint, and integrated into topology with LLDP edges replacing inferred connections. Frontend displays LLDP badge and legend entry correctly.

backend_lldp_api: POST /api/connector/lldp-neighbors with empty neighbors clears data
GET /api/network/lldp/{client_id} returns stored neighbors with correct structure
GET /api/network/topology/{client_id} has LLDP edges with type=lldp and source=lldp
LLDP edges have port-to-port labels (e.g., 'Port 1 <-> Port 24')
LLDP edges replace inferred edges for matching node pairs
frontend_lldp_display: LLDP badge visible: 'LLDP: 2 connessioni' (cyan badge in health bar)
Legend contains LLDP entry with cyan color
All legend entries present: WAN, Trunk, Accesso, Server, MGMT, LLDP, Manuale
Toolbar buttons present: Modifica, Auto, Reset, Salva Layout
LLDP edges visible on map with cyan color and port labels

critical_code_review_comments: LLDP endpoint correctly clears old data before inserting new (delete_many + insert_many pattern)
build_lldp_edges() function properly deduplicates edges using sorted tuple keys
LLDP edges correctly replace inferred edges using set-based overlap detection
Frontend LLDP badge conditionally renders only when lldp_count > 0
EDGE_COLORS map includes 'lldp' with cyan color (#22d3ee)
Legend includes LLDP entry for user reference
seed_data_creation: Test created 2-4 LLDP neighbors for testing, then restored to 2 neighbors
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLDP feature fully validated. Backend: POST /api/connector/lldp-neighbors stores LLDP data from connector (requires X-API-Key header), GET /api/network/lldp/{client_id} returns raw LLDP data, GET /api/network/topology/{client_id} includes lldp_count and LLDP edges. LLDP edges have type='lldp', source='lldp', and port-to-port labels. Frontend: LLDP badge shows 'LLDP: X connessioni' when lldp_count > 0, legend includes LLDP entry with cyan color. LLDP edges are animated and cyan-colored on the map.

frontend_features.lldp_badge: Visible when lldp_count > 0, shows 'LLDP: X connessioni'
frontend_features.lldp_legend: LLDP entry in legend with cyan color (#22d3ee)
frontend_features.lldp_edges: Cyan animated edges with port-to-port labels
